rulings.Case Title: PATTERSON VS RAYBESTOS-MANHATTAN INC*
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. GRANT MOTION FOR SANCTIONS FOR $5,000.00. DEPOSITION OF RONALD JACOBSON ESTABLISHES DECLARATION NOT PREPARED IN GOOD FAITH GIVEN CLEAR DEPOSITION OF JACOBSON CONTRADICTING DECLARATION. DECLARATION OF ROBERT FERGUSON DOES NOT ESTABLISH ADEQUATE BASIS FOR SUBMITTING DECLARATION WITH UNTRUTHFUL WORDING TO JACOBSON FOR SIGNATURE. (CW)
